regulatory_mappings.relevance: Comprehensive audit trails enable detection of unauthorized information disclosure events
Audit trail coverage provides accountability records for all agent actions, detecting unauthorized autonomous behavior

regulatory_mappings.control_name: Organizational practices for AI risk management
regulatory_mappings.relevance: Audit trail coverage supports organizational accountability and incident investigation practices
Audit trails provide the data foundation for measuring system performance and detecting anomalies
Audit trail coverage provides the transparency records needed to understand AI system behavior and decisions
Comprehensive audit trails are a fundamental component of the quality management system for AI
Audit trail coverage provides the evidence records required for internal audit of AI system operations
Comprehensive audit trails supply the data needed for continuous monitoring and measurement
